product.name: Tempered Glass Chair Mat, 40"x60" Office Chair Mat for Hardwood Floor, Clear Computer Chair Mat, 4 Non‑Slip Pads, Smooth Glide & Easy Clean, Carpet Hardwood Floor Protector
features: Highly Transparent Glass Mat: office chair mat for carpet is made of 0.2″ thick reinforced tempered glass that supports up to 1200 lbs. this chair mat offers exceptional clarity and strength. Its modern transparent design not only protects your floor but also enhances your home or office decor

Safety Stability: The rounded corners and polished edges of the chair mat for carpet prevent damage to both the carpet and floor. The included detachable anti-slip pad ensures the mat stays securely in place.The polished edge will not hurt your hand when you move the glass chair mat. And this chair mat is safe and odorless for your home and office space.

Silent Smooth Glide: Ultra-smooth surface coating reduces lumbar strain during extended use. Eliminates chair caster noise, Enjoy effortless chair movement without the usual resistance. Glass chair mat perfect for home offices, gaming setups, commercial spaces, studios, and classrooms.

Easy to Clean& Installation: No tools required - simply position under your desk and start using immediately! tempered glass remains crystal clear, sturdy, and easy to clean—simply wipe with a damp cloth to maintain its clear and polished look. Ideal for both carpeted and hard floors

Versatile Usage: The glass desk chair mat adds an elegant touch to your home office, perfect for safeguarding carpets or floors in offices, bedrooms, and study rooms.. It comes with foam protective packaging to ensure safe delivery. In the unlikely event of any damage during transportation, we are here to assist you. With our glass mat, you can expect a practical and refined workspace
